Our Story

BORN IN
ACCRA.
BUILT FOR
THE WORLD.

Lads From Ghana started with one idea — wear the culture, own the streets. We put Ghana on every garment: the globe, the star, the pride. From Accra to anywhere, this is streetwear that carries a whole country's energy on its back.

GH
Made in Ghana
100%
Culture-first
∞
Streets owned
01
City. The World.
